prompt: A romantic fantasy wedding illustration of two women standing arm in arm in a moonlit palace balcony at night, highly detailed anime style with luminous painterly rendering, elegant and dreamy. The taller woman on the left has light brown shoulder-length softly layered hair and wears a regal ivory-white tailored wedding suit with gold embroidery, a high-collared ruffled shirt, cream vest, cravat, chain accessories, and a long ceremonial coat whose inner lining is deep violet with floral patterns; a purple flower corsage is pinned to her chest. The woman on the right has black long wavy hair and wears an ornate bridal gown in ivory with gold lace embroidery, sheer lace sleeves, a fitted bodice, a very long translucent veil, and rich crimson inner panels and accents peeking from the skirt; she wears red gemstone jewelry and floral hair ornaments in white and red. She holds a large bouquet of red, burgundy, and white flowers with greenery and trailing red ribbons while gently linking arms with her partner. Set them before gothic arched windows, hanging crystal ornaments, glowing lanterns, purple flowers, a distant city skyline, a star-filled sky, and a bright full moon. Add decorative vertical Japanese title text integrated into the composition: on the left, 紫苑の護り with smaller vertical ruby text beside it; on the right, 紅雪の献心 with smaller vertical ruby text beside it. Include crescent moon and snowflake-like decorative motifs framing the titles. Use a tall poster composition, full-body view, luxurious fabrics, sparkling highlights, soft bokeh, and an overall palette of ivory, gold, violet, crimson, and midnight blue.
